packageRules.description: Let pnpm validate minimum release age for lockfile maintenance updates.
prBodyNotes: Renovate's lock file maintenance updates are controlled by the package manager. Confirm pnpm's minimumReleaseAge validation before merging.

packageRules.description: Renovate cannot currently validate minimum release age for package replacements.
prBodyNotes: Renovate's package replacement updates cannot currently validate minimum release age. Manually confirm package age before merging.

packageRules.description: Renovate cannot currently validate minimum release age for package pinning.
prBodyNotes: Renovate's package pinning updates cannot currently validate minimum release age. Manually confirm package age before merging.
